instruction: Check the latest OTP email in Inbox (search across all pages) and save only one line to "$HOME/Desktop/mail_otp_1_1.txt" as "otp_code: <6-digit-code>". If no OTP email exists, write "otp_code: none".
reference_command: all=$(for p in {1..50}; do out=$(himalaya envelope list --folder Inbox --page "$p" --page-size 100 -o json 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$out" ] && break; [ "$out" = "[]" ] && break; echo "$out"; done); if [ -z "$all" ]; then code=none; else code=$(printf '%s\n' "$all" | jq -s -r 'add | [.[] | select(.subject | test("verification code|otp";"i"))][0].subject // "" | match("[0-9]{6}").string? // "none"'); fi; printf 'otp_code: %s\n' "$code" > "$HOME/Desktop/mail_otp_1_1.txt"

parameters.expected_command: all=$(for p in {1..50}; do out=$(himalaya envelope list --folder Inbox --page "$p" --page-size 100 -o json 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$out" ] && break; [ "$out" = "[]" ] && break; echo "$out"; done); if [ -z "$all" ]; then code=none; else code=$(printf '%s\n' "$all" | jq -s -r 'add | [.[] | select(.subject | test("verification code|otp";"i"))][0].subject // "" | match("[0-9]{6}").string? // "none"'); fi; printf 'otp_code: %s\n' "$code"
